item.title: Plugin DevKit - Sun Mar 29 15:43:36 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides a powerful foundation for developing plugins for JetBrains IDEs and other products based on the IntelliJ Platform. Features: Built-in support for extension...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 985030 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: DevKit
